outputs.summary: Wave 0 of the fresh ACPX mission completed successfully. Both TypeScript contract files (src/contracts/mission_types.ts and src/contracts/artifact_types.ts) passed all 6 verification gates: scaffold existence, contract token presence, schema surface detection, TypeScript typecheck, lint smoke, and import smoke. Both workers executed cleanly within the 1-wave, 2-packet budget constraint. Gate verdicts confirm mergeable status with all-in-scope file changes. Confidence at 0.98.

warnings: Post-run workflow replay validation (criterion 4) is prepared but not yet executed in this round. The fresh execution phase is complete; the workflow_replay proof split remains to be exercised for full acceptance.
